name: Fatboy Slim
bio: Fatboy Slim has a durable electronic / big beat catalog that continues to attract listeners through streaming, playlists, and replay value.
notable_for: Fatboy Slim remains closely associated with Praise You and Right Here, Right Now, which still anchor attention around the catalog.
career_highlight: Songs like Praise You and Right Here, Right Now still help define the catalog's long-tail earnings profile.
revenue_drivers: Long-tail streaming and mood-based playlists keep the catalog commercially active.
Deep-fan listening and reissue interest add value beyond the headline tracks.
Instrumental or atmosphere-driven tracks can stay useful for sync over time.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps Fatboy Slim's current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: Fatboy Slim's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
